name: RUNNING MAN 2026
description: A fast-paced 2D endless runner set in a retro-futuristic world where every second tests your reflexes. The character runs automatically, and your goal is to jump at the right moment, avoid obstacles, use powerful artifacts, and beat your best score. The speed increases over time, new traps appear, and every mistake matters. Collect coins, buy upgrades, improve your abilities
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
